featured.title: 高通确认已向安卓厂商提供GBL漏洞修复 小米17系列等骁龙8Elite Gen5机型非官方解锁路径被封堵 - antutu.com
featured.summary: 高通确认已向安卓厂商提供GBL漏洞修复 小米17系列等骁龙8Elite Gen5机型非官方解锁路径被封堵  antutu.com
featured.suggestedTitle: Qualcomm Bootloader Vulnerability Threatens Android Devices
featured.suggestedSummary: Qualcomm has confirmed a critical bootloader vulnerability affecting Android devices, including Xiaomi's Snapdragon 8Elite Gen5 models. The flaw allows unauthorized bootloader unlocking, bypassing security checks. This vulnerability, identified as CVE-2026-21666, poses significant risks of unauthorized access and potential malware installation. Security teams should prioritize patching and ensure bootloader integrity checks are enforced.

featured.title: Google Chrome、深刻度”高”の脆弱性を修正 1週間で3回目の更新、悪用も確認 - ASCII.jp
featured.summary: Google Chrome、深刻度”高”の脆弱性を修正 1週間で3回目の更新、悪用も確認  ASCII.jp
featured.suggestedTitle: Google Chrome Patches Multiple Zero-Day Vulnerabilities
featured.suggestedSummary: Google has released urgent updates for Chrome, addressing two high-severity zero-day vulnerabilities (CVE-2026-3909, CVE-2026-3910) actively exploited in the wild. These vulnerabilities allow remote code execution, impacting all platforms. Users are advised to update to v146.0.7680.80 immediately. The vulnerabilities highlight the critical need for timely patch management to prevent potential exploitation.

featured.title: Outsourcer Telus admits to attack, possibly by ShinyHunters - theregister.com
featured.summary: Outsourcer Telus admits to attack, possibly by ShinyHunters  theregister.com
featured.reason: ShinyHunters linked to major data breaches
featured.suggestedTitle: ShinyHunters Behind Massive Data Breaches at Telus and CarGurus
featured.suggestedSummary: Cybercriminal group ShinyHunters has been linked to recent data breaches at Telus and CarGurus, compromising millions of records. The breaches exposed sensitive customer information, highlighting the group's ongoing threat to corporate data security. Organizations should enhance monitoring and threat intelligence capabilities to detect and mitigate such sophisticated attacks.
